name: Miracle Whip Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the Miracle Whip and sugar in a large bowl until well blended.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, baking soda, baking powder, salt, ground cloves, nutmeg, and cinnamon.
3. In another bowl, mix the water and molasses until combined.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredient mixture to the Miracle Whip and sugar mixture, alternating with the water and molasses mixture. Blend until just combined.
5. Pour the batter into an 8-inch square baking pan lined with parchment paper or coated with cooking spray.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 30-35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan for 10 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
Makes 1-8 inch square cake.
